assistantPrefill.detail: Text prefill is converted into continuation instruction; tool-use prefill is rejected

countTokens.detail: Token counts are estimated by Kiro-Go

fineGrainedToolStreaming.detail: Anthropic SSE input_json_delta is emitted from complete Kiro tool input; true upstream partial JSON parity depends on Kiro stream shape

maxTokensZero.detail: Returns local zero-output compatibility response; not a proven upstream cache warmup

toolReference.detail: tool_reference is accepted and materialized when relevant

toolSchemaValidation.detail: Invalid model-emitted tool_use inputs are repaired or suppressed before Claude Code receives them
